name: STK ProactiveCommand (0xD0)
description: STK BER-TLV ProactiveCommand tag — root of all SIM Toolkit commands

name: STK SEND SHORT MESSAGE
description: STK ProactiveCommand SEND SHORT MESSAGE — command qualifier 0x13

name: STK LAUNCH BROWSER
description: STK ProactiveCommand LAUNCH BROWSER — command qualifier 0x15

name: STK SET UP CALL
description: STK ProactiveCommand SET UP CALL — command qualifier 0x10

name: SIM OTA Command (UDH IEI=0x70)
description: UDH Information Element 0x70 — SIM Data Download (OTA command to SIM)

name: SIM OTA Response (UDH IEI=0x71)
description: UDH Information Element 0x71 — SIM Toolkit security (OTA response)

name: Pegasus Stage-1 binary SMS prefix
description: Binary SMS with originator type 0x91 and prefix 0x10 — observed in Pegasus stage-1 delivery samples (Citizen Lab, Amnesty Tech)

name: GTPv1 Create Session Request
description: GTPv1 message type 0x01 (Create PDP Context Request) — rogue GTP session creation

name: M2PA SIGTRAN header
description: SIGTRAN M2PA chunk type 0x0B — SS7-over-IP message user adaptation

name: SCCP UDT Class-0
description: SCCP Unitdata (0x09) message class 0 — connectionless SS7 transport unit

name: TCAP Invoke component
description: TCAP Begin message with Invoke component — SS7 MAP/CAP operation initiation

name: MAP SendRoutingInfoForSM
description: MAP opcode 45 (0x2D) — SRI-SM, used for IMSI harvesting

name: MAP InsertSubscriberData
description: MAP opcode 7 — ISD, used to inject call forwarding to attacker number

name: MAP AnyTimeInterrogation
description: MAP opcode 71 (0x47) — ATI, real-time subscriber location disclosure

name: WAP Push binary SMS
description: WAP Push binary SMS with application/vnd.wap.sic port header — used for WAP push phishing and Pegasus URL delivery
